title: Attend a Break Into Tech Event - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Attend a Break Into Tech Event - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
Attend a Break Into Tech Event
Learn more about our flexible Align master’s programs
Our Break Into Tech event provides an opportunity to learn more about the Align master’s programs and how computer science, data science, and cybersecurity are integrated into everyday life.
Participate in a hands-on project where you’ll collaborate and discuss diverse perspectives for solving the project.
Meet our faculty and other students considering the program.
Choose an event focused on computer science or data science — or attend both to help you determine which path you want to take.
Break Into Tech: Your introduction to the field of computer science
Watch a preview of a Break Into Tech event, which gives potential students the opportunity to interface with a faculty member and to get a more structured introduction to computer science through an actual problem.
Align programs
Align MS in Computer Science
The Align MS in Computer Science will prepare you to break into tech, without a computer science background.

Align MS in Computer Science Online
The Align MS in Computer Science Online offers a flexible online format with three in-person residences to prepare you to break into tech, without a computer science background.
Locations
Close this dialog window

Align MS in Data Science
The Align MS in Data Science will teach you the skills to harness the power of data, even without a tech background.
Locations
Close this dialog window

Portland
Silicon Valley
Align MS in Cybersecurity
The Align MS in Cybersecurity was designed to give you access to incredible career opportunities even if you didn’t major in CS or cybersecurity.
